content.en:
Ye Tian's fourth deity is currently the ultimate master, and although his combat power is not strong, he also has the combat power of a second-class celestial deity, because Ye Tian's divine powers, Chaos Dao realm, Hunyuan system, and heavenly sword system can all be used on the fourth deity.

The only flaw of the fourth deity is the physical body, even if it is conceived by the strongest supreme treasure, the physical body is still far inferior to the body, and the life level is only comparable to the fifth-order life, not the body at all.

Therefore, the combat power of the fourth deity can only reach the combat power of the second-class Tianzun, but it is also very remarkable.

If the fourth deity breaks through to the realm of Tianzun, he will instantly have supreme-level combat power.

According to Ye Tian's estimation, once the fourth deity breaks through to the realm of Tianzun, it should have the combat power of a third-class supreme, although it is not strong, far less than those second-rank and above supremes in the twelve universe eras, but at least it has the qualifications to negotiate, so it will not be ignored.

And the identity of him to negotiate is a mysterious force!

That's right, Ye Tian is going to divide his identity into a mysterious force in the chaos that is comparable to the Hidden God Organization, so that those supremes of the Twelve Universe Era will not dare to attack Ye Tian, and Ye Tian can deliberately report some information, so that he can trade with those supremes of the Twelve Universe Era.

"Innate light source, once he gets the innate light source and practices the constant light supernatural power, he will be fearless of everything, even if he can't beat others, he can escape.

Unless it is some supreme who is too rebellious and can target the constant light supernatural powers, he can't be stopped at all.

At that time, his ability to save his life instantly increased many times in an instant.

......

Wasteland.

Ye Tian's fourth and third deities are now settled here, and if the fourth deity wants to break through the realm of Tianzun, this is an excellent place, because the turbulence of breaking through the Tianzun is very large, and if it is in the outside world, it is easy to be sensed.

Even in the edge of the universe, it is easy to be discovered, because once you break through to the realm of Heavenly Venerable, the origin of the universe will come in vastness, and at that time, the movement is too great, and the nearby supreme can sense it.

In the past, Ye Tian didn't worry about this problem, even if it was discovered, it didn't matter, but now the situation in the universe is too chaotic, and anything will happen.

He had to be a little more cautious for the sake of safety.

So, he chose to break through in the Wasteland.

The Wasteland is a special Chaos Spirit Treasure, which is very rare and cannot be peeped into by the Supremes.

Moreover, even if he broke through in the Wasteland, the Supreme Beings of the outside world knew about it, and at most he thought that another innate god in the Wasteland had broken through to the Heavenly Venerable Realm, and he would not care at all.

Ye Tian's breakthrough this time was absolutely safe, and no one would suspect him.

Deserted Tower.

The fourth deity began to retreat and cultivate, preparing to impact the Heavenly Venerable realm.

It is difficult to dominate Tianzun, but as long as the conditions are met, it is not difficult, Ye Tian has a supreme talent, which is higher than the mixed-level cultivation talent, and naturally meets the conditions for entering Tianzun, and the only state of mind problem that restricts the bottleneck, Ye Tian has already broken through.

Now, he is not only in the seventh-level state of mind, but due to the continuous improvement of his cultivation, his strength has been increasing, and his soul is becoming stronger and stronger, and the level of his state of mind has naturally improved a lot, and he is currently at the peak of the seventh-level state of mind.

It's a pity that there is a lack of cultivation methods for the eighth layer of state of mind in the universe, otherwise he can definitely impact the eighth level state of mind.

With enough talent and enough state of mind, it is naturally not difficult for Ye Tian to enter the Tianzun realm, and the second deity has also entered the Tianzun realm before, although now the second deity has annihilated itself, Ye Tian is no stranger to the Tianzun realm at all.

After adjusting his state, Ye Tian began to attack.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to break through.

Bang!!!

The advent of the universe origin made Ye Tian's fourth deity's physical body continue to transform, and the small universe of the fourth deity became more vast and powerful.

And the soul!

The soul of the fourth deity is also transforming, which is the reward of the origin of the universe.

Although this universe suppresses the soul and the physical body, breaking through to the Tianzun realm will still make the physical body and soul transform, otherwise the thin physical body will not be able to carry the divine power of the Tianzun level at all.

No matter how much the Origin of the Universe suppresses the path of cultivation, it will not let the path of cultivation be cut off, so the Supremes have already broken half of the blockade, and they can pay a certain price to slightly improve their bodies and souls, including the Supremes who have not taken the path of rebellion.

In the past, Ye Tian thought that he had to take the path of rebellion in order to continuously improve his body and soul, but when he stepped into this realm, he understood many truths.

The origin of the universe is not omnipotent, and even the rules of the universe still have loopholes, as long as you find loopholes, you can still find a way to break the shackles and improve your strength.

For example, the first god lord of the god clan and the first demon lord of the demon race, their physical bodies are not very weak, although they cannot be compared with those supremes of the twelve universe eras, or even comparable to Ye Tian, but they are much stronger than the physical bodies of ordinary Tianzun and supreme, this is the effect of finding loopholes and paying a huge price to improve the physical body.

But in any case, the Supremes at least have a way to improve their physical bodies and souls, and the cosmic cultivators below the Heavenly Venerable really can't improve the strength of their physical bodies, except that their divine power is strong and their souls are slightly stronger, they are almost no different from the god level.

Time passes day by day......

The Heavenly Venerable aura emanating from the Desolate Pagoda became more and more powerful, and the other innate gods of the Desolate Realm looked at the Desolate Pagoda in fear one by one.

Somewhere in the wasteland.

Desolate Venerable sat with several supreme-level innate gods, his eyes looking at Desolate Tower, and their brows furrowed.

"This doppelganger of the Realm Lord is so powerful!"

An innate deity spirit Dao.

As for the fact that Ye Tian had several clones, these innate gods all knew about it, but they had made an oath and could not reveal it.

In fact, Ye Tian also wanted to hide it, but several clones entered the wasteland one after another, and they needed to ask for resources and walk around, so it was impossible to hide it, so they could only inform these innate gods.

"Yes, I just broke through the realm of Heavenly Venerable, but my aura is comparable to that of a third-class supreme! At the beginning, the combat power we exerted in the Wasteland with the help of the Origin of the Wasteland was only the top third-class supreme. And now, the doppelganger of the realm lord is equivalent to a third-class supreme by relying on his own combat power, and if he uses the origin of the desolate realm, he may be able to exert the combat power of the top second-class supreme. If a first-class supreme enters the Wasteland, if he is suppressed by the Wasteland, the Realm Lord may be able to fight with him!"

Aramazun sighed.

Originally, they had surrendered to Ye Tian, but now that Ye Tian's fourth deity strength had broken through to the realm of Tianzun, and his combat power was comparable to that of a third-class supreme, they had no intention of defecting.

In the blink of an eye, a year has passed.

In one year, Ye Tian completely stabilized the realm of the fourth deity.

Now, the fourth deity can be called the supreme.

The Supreme and the Heavenly Venerable are both in the same realm, but the difference in combat power is just that once you have the supreme-level combat power, it is the Supreme, and it is no longer the Heavenly Venerable.

It's just that Ye Tian's cultivation is relatively weak, and he has just broken through to the realm, and he can continue to cultivate and continue to improve.

"The Tianzun realm is also divided into Tianzun one to nine orders, most of the ancient supremes are the cultivation of the ninth order peak of Tianzun, but it is difficult to improve the cultivation of the Tianzun realm, and most of the supreme's combat power does not rely on cultivation, cultivation only determines the capacity of divine power, mainly relying on combat means and secret arts. The gap between the cultivation of the first order of Tianzun and the cultivation of the peak of the ninth order of Tianzun is not too big, it is not insurmountable, otherwise my body will not be enough to match the fourth-order supreme in the master realm!" Ye Tian said darkly.

But there is an advantage to improving cultivation, that is, the battle time is longer, and it can improve the strength a little.

For Ye Tian, improving his cultivation and improving his combat effectiveness will be even more.

Other Heavenly Venerables or Supreme Beings can only improve their cultivation, and the degree of improvement in the strength of their physical body and soul is almost negligible, but Ye Tian is different, he can continue to improve.

But that's limited to Ye Tian's body!

Ye Tian's fourth deity is not good, the fourth deity is the same as other supremes, the degree of physical and soul ascension is limited, and it can only be improved and cultivated.

"Even if you can only improve your cultivation, that's not bad. My ontology has to be accumulated, and I can't break through to the Heavenly Venerable realm now. The fourth deity is now the first order of the Heavenly Venerable, and when you break through to the third order of the Heavenly Venerable, you will go and trade with the Lord of the Yuan Gu and other supremes!"

Ye Tian thought so.

So, he continued to cultivate, refining a large amount of resources one by one, and used them to improve the cultivation realm of the fourth deity.

In this way, ten years have passed.

With Ye Tian disregarding resources, the fourth deity finally reached the cultivation of the third order of the Heavenly Venerable, and his combat power was still in the third-order supreme realm, but it was in the early stage of the third-class supreme before, and now it is equivalent to the mid-stage realm of the third-class supreme.

"It's almost, even if you immediately upgrade your cultivation to the ninth order of Tianzun, you will at most be at the top level of the third-class Tianzun, and you will not be able to reach the second-order Tianzun realm at all!"

Ye Tian understood the gap and shackles between the third-class Heavenly Venerable and the second-class Heavenly Venerable, if it was so easy to enter the second-class supreme combat power, the human race would not have a second-class supreme without it.

"It's time to go find the Lord of the Yuangu!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The next moment, he left the wasteland and headed for the Yuangu Palace.
